reasoning: In a typical year, the Spotify Wrapped tracking period spans from January 1 through roughly mid-November. By mid-October, nearly 90% of the tracking year is complete, and daily tracking tools allow predicting the annual top artist almost deterministically. The Polymarket price of 0.00 on October 16, 2025 indicates that The Weeknd is trailing the leader by a margin that is mathematically impossible to overcome within the final few weeks of the tracking period. I conform to this market reality by choosing the lowest possible allowed value of 0.02.
